-  FFCAP_ET_FRICTION 

Global Variable# FFCAP_ET_FRICTION

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFCAP_ET_FRICTION: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffcap_et_friction#Discussion)

The effect represents a friction force effect.
